compiled_state.title: bash-runner.sh discovers run-*-tests.sh aggregators as individual test items — causes batched runner to re-run entire suite as single item
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Classification: behavioral, Score: 1 (BASIC). Root cause: bash-runner.sh line 33 discovers run-*-tests.sh alongside test-*.sh. Suite aggregators are treated as single test items by the batched runner, causing them to re-run all tests and get killed by the time budget. On resume, individual test-*.sh files restart from scratch because only the aggregator was tracked.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
